description: Sync-drift orphan, fixed. Black Bolt Drilbur 045/086 already carried characters: [drilbur-line] in frontmatter AND was already listed in the node's appears_on plus given a full body bullet -- but the card had no ## Connections section at all, so the card-to-node half of the edge was never written. Classic one-sided edge: node knows the card, card doesn't know the node. Completed the back-edge with a Connections bullet drawn faithfully from the node's own body language (drilbur-line.md line 47), in the same register as the card's three sibling Black Bolt evolution-pair connections. No new claim invented -- this is mirror-completion, not edge-creation. Worst kind of bug, the silent kind. Now it traverses from both ends.
other_candidates_considered: Snivy/Servine + Dwebble/Crustle Black Bolt 1:1 mirrors -- no Mr. Nodeley node: corpus is 2 prints, 1 set each; the Snivy connection text itself stages the snivy-line node threshold at 3+ prints across 2+ sets, NOT met. 1:1 mirror is correctly the terminal state.

Rufflet-XY11-92 <-> Braviary-SV8-153 enlightened snip -- already done in a prior pass; both cards now carry clean [[rufflet-line]] connections that explicitly note the prior 1:1 mirror is subsumed. No bullet left to remove.

Drilbur CEC-114 <-> Excadrill FUS-183 wave-27 mirror dissolution -- drilbur-line.md caveat (line 83) explicitly stages this as a separate single-operation enlightened-Edgelord decision; not bundled here per one-op-per-invocation. Staged for a future pass.

~23 cards corpus-wide have a characters: pointer but no ## Connections section (132 vs 109) -- this Drilbur is one of them. The remaining ~22 are a sync-drift sweep worth a dedicated wave; surfaced here, not executed.
next_pass_suggestions: Sweep the ~22 other characters-pointer-but-no-Connections orphan cards (grep characters: minus grep '## Connections' across cards/pokemon/). Each is a one-sided edge needing the same back-edge completion.
Dissolve-and-replace the wave-27 Drilbur CEC-114 <-> Excadrill FUS-183 1:1 mirror, subsumed by drilbur-line per that node's line-83 caveat.
